title: 有馬記念の後に・1年後に会おう

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan puts up a good race at the Arima
Kinen, but she's no match for Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri recognizes Ryan's talent, however, and
vows to face her again in the same race next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this experience in hand, Mejiro Ryan aims
for a rematch against Mejiro McQueen with the
spring Tenno Sho next in her sights!
